entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated groundnut (Arachis hypogaea) characterized by a narrow genetic base.

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The genetic diversity of a species, which is narrow in cultivated groundnut.

entities.name: WILD ARACHIS
entities.description: Wild species of Arachis containing potentially useful alleles to broaden the genetic base of cultivated groundnut.

entities.name: PLOIDY MANIPULATION
entities.description: A technique used to access genetic variations locked in distant gene pools.

entities.name: BRIDGE CROSSES
entities.description: A technique used to access genetic variations locked in distant gene pools.

entities.name: OVULE EMBRYO CULTURE
entities.description: A technique used to access genetic variations locked in distant gene pools.

entities.name: PEST AND DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: A trait transferred from secondary gene pool species to cultivated groundnut.

entities.name: SECONDARY GENE POOL
entities.description: A group of species from which resistance to pests and diseases has been transferred to cultivated groundnut.

entities.name: TERTIARY GENE POOL
entities.description: A group of species that have been successfully crossed with cultivated groundnut.

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Tools used to monitor introgression and minimize linkage drag during the transfer of alleles.

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used as a genomic resource to monitor introgression.

entities.name: DART
entities.description: Diversity Arrays Technology used as a genomic resource to monitor introgression.

entities.name: GENOME MAP
entities.description: AA- and BB-genome maps used as genomic resources to monitor introgression.

entities.name: BAC LIBRARY
entities.description: Bacterial Artificial Chromosome library used as a genomic resource to monitor introgression.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material from one species into the gene pool of another.

entities.name: LINKAGE DRAG
entities.description: The unwanted transfer of genetic material along with a target gene during introgression.

entities.name: USEFUL ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic variations from wild species used to broaden the genetic base of cultivated groundnut.
